sources.name: Codex Multi Agent Playbook (am.will)
sources.description: Original Codex skills repo with planner, parallel-task, and llm-council multi-agent orchestration patterns

sources.name: AdaptOrch: Task-Adaptive Multi-Agent Orchestration
sources.description: DAG topology routing algorithm for mapping task decomposition to optimal orchestration patterns. 12-23% improvement over static baselines.

sources.name: Latency-Aware Orchestration for Parallel Multi-Agent Systems
sources.description: Models multi-agent search space as probabilistic DAG, jointly optimizing accuracy and latency under parallel execution.
sources.arxiv_query: latency-aware orchestration parallel multi-agent LLM DAG 2026

sources.name: Multi-Agent Collaboration via Evolving Orchestration
sources.description: RL-trained orchestrator dynamically sequences and prioritizes agents. Validates the puppeteer pattern for centralized coordination.
sources.arxiv_query: evolving orchestration multi-agent collaboration reinforcement learning 2025

sources.name: OpenAI Agents SDK Multi-Agent Patterns
sources.description: Official OpenAI documentation for multi-agent orchestration with handoffs and routines

sources.name: Claude Code Subagents Documentation
sources.description: Official Claude Code documentation for dispatching subagents with Agent tool, worktree isolation, and model selection

sources.name: AI Agent Swarm Orchestration Best Practices (Fast.io)
sources.description: Industry guide covering hierarchical, sequential, and peer-to-peer swarm architectures with practical tradeoffs
